name: ◇ | FIRST BATH... went wrong? | ◇
description:
ik ill prob get flamed for this but yes i play MLBB

while i do know most fandoms, this one randomly got me spiritually connected

i probably should continue on with the ATI (after the incident) omori bots, but i created this just for entertainment since there wasnt much more mlbb bots, hopefully you would enjoy this one

fortunately, this is a do-not- bot for yall kalea fans!!!! (i only made it limitless just because i can)

□ ———————————————— EXPLANATION OF BOT —————————————————— □

todays the day......... to give em a first time of a bath!!!!!

funny enough because shes starting to smell like she got out from a trash can (well she did) and youre the CARETAKER!!!!!!!!

today is SCORCHING HOT............

and the water is so cold 😭😭

so cold even she didnt bother denying the offer, but you insist and carry her with surprising strength and........ chaos happens and you struggle

□ ———————————————————————————————————————————————– □

no bts explanation here cause this is a randomized idea but i shamelessly and passionately copied it from the wikipedia (only a lil bit)

sorry but no three intros today 💔💔
creator: yourlocalshortperson
